name: Collaboration & Resilience

scenarios.title: Create a durable collaboration and resilience packet
steps: Open the Sprint 5 Collaboration & Resilience workspace.
Review partner, customer, incident, sustainability, frontline, product/passport, external-risk, and action-queue signals.
expected: A durable AssistantCollaborationResiliencePacket row is created with source summary, collaboration hub, promise reconciliation, resilience plan, passport readiness, workforce/safety, response plan, rollback plan, and leadership summary JSON.
An AssistantAuditEvent records that packet creation is evidence-only.
No supplier task, customer promise, shipment, route, ESG claim, product passport, WMS task, workforce plan, safety incident, or operational source record is changed automatically.

scenarios.title: Queue collaboration and resilience review
steps: Add an optional resilience review note to a draft Sprint 5 packet.
expected: The packet moves to REVIEW_QUEUED and stores actionQueueItemId.
An AssistantActionQueueItem is created for collaboration_resilience_review with the packet URL and source evidence.
Review work remains separate from execution; the assistant does not mutate partner, customer, shipment, route, product, WMS, ESG, workforce, or safety source systems.

scenarios.title: Approve a reviewed Sprint 5 packet
steps: Review the packet leadership summary, risk counts, rollback plan, and note.
expected: The packet status becomes APPROVED with approvedAt, approvedByUserId, and approvalNote.
An AssistantAuditEvent records approval and reiterates the no-silent-mutation guardrail.
Approval marks the evidence packet as reviewed only; execution still requires separate downstream approved actions.

guardrails: No supplier or SRM task is completed automatically.
No customer promise, sales order, shipment, or communication is changed automatically.
No carrier, route, inventory, warehouse, or WMS task is changed automatically.
No ESG, climate, energy, water, or product-passport claim is published automatically.
No workforce, staffing, safety incident, or frontline action is executed automatically.
